title: The Fed - April 28-29, 2026 FOMC Meeting
author: Sigma Capital
metaDescription: The Federal Reserve held its FOMC meeting on April 28-29, 2026, and released the official summary on April 29, 2026. Key decisions and statements were made rega
excerpt: The Federal Reserve held its FOMC meeting on April 28-29, 2026, and released the official summary on April 29, 2026. Key decisions and statements were made regarding monetary policy. The meeting concluded with a press conference on the same day.

content.introduction: The Federal Reserve held its FOMC meeting on April 28-29, 2026, and released the official summary on April 29, 2026. Key decisions and statements were made regarding monetary policy. The meeting concluded with a press conference on the same day.
